steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The blank follows ‘making’ and precedes ‘the first time the organization would appoint a Vietnamese leader.’‘Making’ functions as a verb introducing a result. The blank requires a singular pronoun (his appointment) to refer to the event triggering the consequence.

steps.title: Apply the pronoun agreement rule
steps.content: ‘This’ correctly refers to a singular, defined event (his appointment as thirteenth secretary-general). The other three either use plural pronouns (these/t hose) or an indefinite/irrelevant term (some). That matches choice C — C is correct.
